creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Raphael Kubo da Costa from comment #14)
> The "maintainer-feedback+" flag just indicates that you as the port
> maintainer has approved this patch. It also shows this bug in the "Ports:
> Maintainer Approved" saved search in Bugzilla, which is helpful for
> committers to see that a patch is ready to be landed.

Sorry, I meant the "maintainer-approval+" flag.
